================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D7 96 5F D9 40
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x50
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 33

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x50
PayloadLen   : 33

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]

8F C2 F5 3C 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
01

01
